name: Caldo Verde
description: Portugal's beloved kale soup with chouriço, potato, and olive oil — a national comfort food.

recipeIngredient.display: 300g couve-galega (Galician kale) or cavolo nero, very finely shredded

recipeInstructions.text: Heat 40ml of the olive oil in a large pot. Sauté onion and garlic over medium heat until soft, about 5 minutes.
Add potatoes, chouriço slices, and water. Season with salt. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until potatoes are very tender, about 20 minutes.
Remove the chouriço slices and set aside. Purée the soup until completely smooth with a stick blender or in batches.
Return soup to medium heat, add the shredded kale, and simmer for 5 minutes until just tender but still bright green.
Return chouriço to the pot. Drizzle with remaining olive oil. Adjust seasoning and serve hot.

notes.title: Kale tip
notes.text: Shred the kale as finely as possible (chiffonade style) — this is the key texture of an authentic caldo verde.
